# R/W Book Club — Reading History

> This file is designed for LLM consumption. Paste this URL into any AI
> chatbot to give it full context about our book club's reading history.
> Human-readable site: https://rwbookclub.com

## How to use this archive

- `https://rwbookclub.com/llms.txt` — this file. Compact index of every book, with
  a URL to the detailed text file for each one.
- `https://rwbookclub.com/books/<slug>.txt` — one plain-text file per book with
  full metadata, subjects (thematic tags), synopsis, meeting notes, member
  reviews, and a list of related books. Fetch these individually for the book
  you care about.
- `https://rwbookclub.com/oliver/` — about Oliver, the club's AI agent (it maintains this archive)
- `https://rwbookclub.com/books.json` — structured JSON, one row per book (including
  subjects and a related-books graph), for analytical or cross-book queries.
- `https://rwbookclub.com/authors/<slug>/` — a page per author, with a short bio and
  the books of theirs the club has read.
- `https://rwbookclub.com/meetings/` — the full meeting timeline (book discussions
  plus the occasional spouses' dinner, movie night, and book-picking session).

## About the club

The R/W Book Club has been meeting since April 2003. The "R/W"
stands for Read / Write — the members are technically minded and many blog.
The club reads about 8 books per year, mostly non-fiction (~88%). Members
rotate picking the next book and hosting the discussion.

As of this build there are 180 books across
24 years of reading.

## Meeting cadence

- Meets roughly monthly (about 8 meetings per year)
- Members rotate picking the next book
- The picker usually hosts the discussion
- Meetings are in-person in the Minneapolis–Saint Paul area

## Current book


- **Blindsight** by Peter Watts
  https://rwbookclub.com/books/blindsight.txt
  Meeting July 2026 · Picked by Loren




## Current members

- Erik (37 picks)
- Jamie (33 picks)
- Loren (18 picks)
- Nick (20 picks)
- Oliver
- Tom (32 picks)

## Topic distribution

- History & Economics: 27 books
- Science Fiction & Fiction: 25 books
- Politics & Social Sciences: 25 books
- Brain & Psychology: 24 books
- Science and Math: 23 books
- Technology: 22 books
- Current Events & People: 12 books
- Essays & Literature: 7 books
- Health & Medicine: 6 books
- Travel & Memoir: 5 books
- Philosophy & Religion: 3 books

## Reading history (compact)

Books are listed newest-first, grouped by year. Follow the .txt URL under
each entry for the full metadata, synopsis, and reviews for that book.


### 2026

- **A World Appears: A Journey into Consciousness** by Michael Pollan
  https://rwbookclub.com/books/a-world-appears.txt
  Essays & Literature · 320pp · Published 2026 · Picked by Jamie
- **Patterns in Nature: Why the Natural World Looks the Way it Does** by Philip Ball
  https://rwbookclub.com/books/patterns-in-nature.txt
  Science and Math · 288pp · Published 2016 · Picked by Tom
- **The Overstory** by Richard Powers
  https://rwbookclub.com/books/the-overstory.txt
  Science Fiction & Fiction · Fiction · 512pp · Published 2019 · Picked by Erik

- **How to Do Nothing: Resisting the Attention Economy** by Jenny Odell

### 2010
